'''gavulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalassocrat|thalassocrat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-v-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalassocrat|thalassocrat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gavulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gævilith|gævilith]] || [[word:gævilij|gævilij]] || [[word:gævilish|gævilish]] || [[word:gævili|gævili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gavuvuluth|gavuvuluth]] || [[word:gavuvuluj|gavuvuluj]] || [[word:gavuvulush|gavuvulush]] || [[word:gavuvulu|gavuvulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gavuluth|gavuluth]] || [[word:gavuluj|gavuluj]] || [[word:gavulush|gavulush]] || [[word:gavulu|gavulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gavufluth|gavufluth]] || [[word:gavufluj|gavufluj]] || [[word:gavuflush|gavuflush]] || [[word:gavufluf|gavufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gavuluthu|gavuluthu]] || [[word:gavuluju|gavuluju]] || [[word:gavulushu|gavulushu]] || [[word:gavuluku|gavuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gavuluth|gavuluth]] || [[word:gavuluj|gavuluj]] || [[word:gavulush|gavulush]] || [[word:gavulu|gavulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gavuluthul|gavuluthul]] || [[word:gavulujul|gavulujul]] || [[word:gavulushul|gavulushul]] || [[word:gavulukul|gavulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gavuluthuthu|gavuluthuthu]] || [[word:gavulujuju|gavulujuju]] || [[word:gavulushushu|gavulushushu]] || [[word:gavuluku|gavuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gavuluthun|gavuluthun]] || [[word:gavulujun|gavulujun]] || [[word:gavulushun|gavulushun]] || [[word:gavulukun|gavulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gavuluthuoro|gavuluthuoro]] || [[word:gavulujuoro|gavulujuoro]] || [[word:gavulushuoro|gavulushuoro]] || [[word:gavulukuoro|gavulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
